title: DESIGN.md frontmatter (Feinschliff brand contract)
description: Subset of Google's DESIGN.md spec (Apache 2.0, github.com/google-labs-code/design.md) used by Feinschliff brands. The runtime ships static .pptx; this is build-time only.

version.description: Spec version of upstream DESIGN.md. Currently 'alpha'.

extends.description: Parent brand name. The DSL pipeline walks this chain to inherit tokens.json + compounds; child fields override parent.

additionalProperties.description: Hex color, exactly 7 chars (#RRGGBB), no alpha.

spacing.description: Spacing scale. Reserved for future use.

rounded.description: Corner-radius scale. Reserved for future use.

components.description: Component-level tokens. Reserved for future use.
